purpose: Visual quality review of the RGB-only Ground Truth inspection set; it is not a Gaussian label artifact.

views.note: The light-gray pole, arms, and feet are clear and distinct from the black whiteboard support.
Desk and monitor geometry obscures the lower rack; it can only corroborate visible upper structure.
The rack silhouette and feet are visible.
The rack is visible with a different foreground relationship.
The upper structure and foot placement are partially visible through desk occlusion.
Severe reconstruction collapse prevents reliable ownership labels.
The pole, arms, and feet are visible from an independent bearing.

annotation_rule: Only usable or partial views may provide target evidence. Insufficient views remain neutral and must not become negative evidence.
